title: Event Organizer Lead Extractor Input
description: Either provide a list of event URLs, or search for events by keyword and source.

eventUrls.title: Event URLs
eventUrls.description: List of Luma or Eventbrite event page URLs to extract organizer info from. If provided, 'query' and 'source' are ignored.

query.title: Search keyword
query.description: Keywords to search for events (used when eventUrls is empty). E.g. 'AI startup San Francisco'.

source.title: Source platform
source.description: Which platform to search when using keyword search mode.

city.title: City
city.description: City to filter events by (search mode only)

maxResults.title: Max leads
maxResults.description: Maximum number of organizer leads to extract. Default: 50.
